name: General Tso's Chicken 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, place chicken pieces. Combine 3 tablespoons soy sauce and 1 tablespoon cornstarch. Blend in beaten egg white. Pour over chicken and toss to coat well. Marinate in refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
2. In a small bowl, combine remaining 2 tablespoons soy sauce, vinegar, white wine, and 1 teaspoon cornstarch; mix until smooth. Stir in brown sugar, sesame oil, and salt.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Deep-fry chicken pieces in batches for about 1 minute, or until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. Pour all but 2 tablespoons oil out of the wok.
4. Add chili peppers, garlic, and ginger to the wok; stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Return chicken pieces to the wok. Pour sauce mixture over the chicken and cook, stirring, about 1 minute until thickened. Serve immediately with rice and sauteed snow peas and red peppers. The chicken is spicy hot due to the dried chili peppers, so adjust to your taste. Enjoy!
